student.routes

Student-facing routes: course browser, transcript, add course, and drop course.

All routes require an authenticated session with role ‘student’ or ‘system_admin’. Routes are registered on the ‘student’ blueprint under /student.

Functions

index()

transcript()

drop_course(o_id)

add_course(o_id)

Module Contents

student.routes.index()[source]
student.routes.transcript()[source]
student.routes.drop_course(o_id)[source]
student.routes.add_course(o_id)[source]
